ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED VERIFY PROTOCOL (E20 verify lane; no LLM spend, own reasoning only).

TARGET: independently recompute E20 headline numbers from RAW artifacts in /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E20/out (cl_results.parquet, rejudged_top100.parquet, cleaned-labels.parquet, noise_matrix.json) + the E20/inputs/feedback.db clone. Do not trust summary.json.

CHECKS:
1. Flip metrics from rejudged_top100.parquet, recomputing flip = (rejudged_is_steering != is_steering) from scratch (not the stored flip col): flagged flip 31/73=0.425 CI[0.315,0.534]; borderline 6/27=0.222; opus-flagged 17/50=0.34; gpt5.5-flagged 14/23=0.609; top100 37/100=0.37; coverage 100/100. Bootstrap seed 1729 n=10000.
2. n_flagged=73, OOF AUC=0.9688, confident_joint [[1080,4],[69,2773]], noise matrix [[0.949,0.0017],[0.0506,0.998]] — recomputed from stored prob_steer + is_steering via the Northcutt CL estimator.
3. Full-pipeline reproduction: re-run TF-IDF(1-2gram)+source_kind one-hot, 5-fold StratifiedKFold LR (seed 1729, C=4, balanced) against E20/inputs/feedback.db to reproduce prob_steer/n_flagged/AUC independently of the stored parquet.
4. cleanlab 2.9.0 cross-check of confident joint + flagged set (claim: hand-rolled == cleanlab 73/73).
5. cleaned-labels.parquet: 5475 rows, 100 rejudged, 37 labels changed (34 steer->nosteer, 3 nosteer->steer).
6. Criterion registered-vs-evaluated: pre-reg = ">=60% of flagged suspects flip"; check evaluated on flagged (73), not a moved goalpost. Confirm NOT PENDING-E15 (pre-reg states hard criterion in scope) so criterion_met verdict is legitimately stated.
7. Population note: pre-reg said N=5756; results use N=5475 (opus 4692->4411). Characterize the drop.

SUCCESS: CONFIRMED if all headline numbers reproduce on recomputation; PLAUSIBLE if partial; REFUTED with specifics.
